title: Address & reputation scanning (de.fi / Token Sniffer / DappBay parity)

de_fi.view0x_gap: no wallet-level approval graph; no portfolio view

token_sniffer.view0x_gap: no reputation score; no liquidity/ownership quick flags for deployed tokens

dappbay.view0x_gap: no chain-specific BSC scanner; no address-only flow

principles: Slither on verified source remains the core differentiator
Address scan = fetch source + heuristics + optional Slither merge
Wallet/approval risk (full de.fi parity) is Phase 4, not MVP

tasks.title: Competitor signal matrix
tasks.description: Document signals: honeypot, mintable, owner, tax/fee, blacklist, proxy, liquidity lock, holder concentration, similar bytecode (Token Sniffer), BSC red flags (DappBay).

tasks.title: Unified report schema
tasks.description: JSON schema: addressScanResult { chain, address, contractType, reputationScore, riskLevel, heuristics[], slitherSummary?, sourceFetched, scannedAt }.

tasks.title: Chain registry config
tasks.description: chains.json: ETH mainnet, BSC (56); explorer API base URLs, native symbol, block explorer links.

tasks.title: Etherscan API client
tasks.description: getContractSourceCode, getabi, eth_getCode proxy; handle unverified contracts.

tasks.title: BscScan API client
tasks.description: Same endpoints as Etherscan-compatible BscScan API.

tasks.title: Address validation & checksum
tasks.description: Validate 0x address, EIP-55 checksum, reject EOAs vs contracts (code length check).

tasks.title: Proxy / implementation resolver
tasks.description: Detect EIP-1967 / minimal proxy; scan implementation address when proxy.

tasks.title: RPC read module
tasks.description: eth_call for owner(), totalSupply(), decimals(); optional Alchemy/Infura RPC URLs per chain.

tasks.title: Ownership & admin flags
tasks.description: owner renounced, single owner, hidden owner patterns, mint function exposed.

tasks.title: Trading / honeypot heuristics
tasks.description: buy/sell tax detection hints, cannot sell, high fee, blacklist mapping checks (bytecode/string scan).

tasks.title: Liquidity signals
tasks.description: LP pair existence, lock hints (known locker contracts), low liquidity warning.

tasks.title: Reputation score aggregator
tasks.description: Weighted score 0-100 from heuristics; map to LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL like Token Sniffer.

tasks.title: POST /api/scan/address
tasks.description: Body: { address, chainId }. Returns job id or sync result for quick mode.

tasks.title: Scan worker job type
tasks.description: Bull queue: fetch source -> heuristics -> if source, run Python Slither -> merge into Analysis record.

tasks.title: GET /api/scan/address/:id
tasks.description: Poll combined result; cache by address+chain 24h.

tasks.title: Public rate limits
tasks.description: Stricter limits for unauthenticated address scans; API key tier for bulk.

tasks.title: Store scan history
tasks.description: DB model AddressScan linked to User; dedupe recent scans.

tasks.title: Scan mode toggle
tasks.description: ContractAnalyzer: Paste source | Scan address; chain dropdown (ETH, BSC).

tasks.title: Unified risk report card
tasks.description: Sections: Reputation score, Heuristic flags, Slither findings (if source), Explorer links.

tasks.title: Risk badges & copy
tasks.description: Human-readable explanations per flag (similar to Token Sniffer labels).

tasks.title: Share / export address scan
tasks.description: Reuse share token flow for address scan results.

tasks.title: Wallet address mode
tasks.description: Scan EOA: list token approvals, unlimited approvals, known malicious spenders.

tasks.title: Approval revocation links
tasks.description: Deep links to revoke.cash / explorer token approval tools.

tasks.title: Portfolio DeFi exposure
tasks.description: Optional: DeBank/DefiLlama API for protocol exposure summary.

tasks.title: ETHERSCAN + BSCSCAN keys on VPS
tasks.description: Add to .env; document in .env.example.

tasks.title: Integration tests
tasks.description: Mock explorer responses; test known safe vs flagged fixture addresses.

tasks.title: Swagger docs for scan endpoints
tasks.description: Add to /docs OpenAPI paths.
